faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Bethpage homes?
faqs.answer: Bethpage residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older Long Island homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for your situation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bethpage and Nassau County. Most ant treatments take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. Follow-up visits are scheduled as needed to ensure complete colony elimination.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 pricing include for ant control?
faqs.answer: Our ant control pricing covers a thorough property inspection, identification of ant species and entry points, interior and exterior treatment application, and a initial follow-up visit. The final cost depends on property size, infestation severity, and whether you need one-time treatment or ongoing prevention. We provide free estimates for all Bethpage properties.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets in Bethpage homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and family-safe application methods that are highly effective against ants while posing minimal risk to children and pets. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions, but most treatments allow you to return to treated areas within 2-4 hours once surfaces are dry.
